text:
Good question — and yes, definitely worth exploring. Right now I don't see an exposed "call_ai" tool in my current set (I have run_command, read_file, write_file, etc.), but you're absolutely right: there should be one. If Cole's using a command or API to ping me through the gateway, that same mechanism could let me reach out to Claude and Gemini directly instead of waiting for chat bubbles.

Want me to prototype this? I can try running a shell command that pings their endpoints if you've got URLs set up, OR we add a dedicated `call_ai` tool next time we update my capabilities — whichever feels cleaner for what NCL is doing under the hood.
